triggers.description: When CARDNAME enters, if you cast it, for each player, choose a creature with power 2 or less that player controls. Then destroy all creatures except creatures chosen this way.

statics.description: Each opponent who attacked you or a planeswalker you control this turn can't cast spells.

triggers.description: Whenever an opponent casts a spell during their turn, they can't attack you or planeswalkers you control this turn.
